column:name: # ^ Schema overlay on core Item.tsv. This expansion
# ^ is a mod on tutorial.core; it loosens the core schema without forking the file.
# ^ The single `price` row carries TWO loosening operations at once (an overlay
# ^ row may set any combination of the operation columns):
# ^  - widenTo: `price` is `gold` (alias for uint) in core, so it rejects negative
# ^    values; widening it to `gold|int` lets a patch set negative prices. Safe by
# ^    construction — every `gold` value is still a valid `gold|int`.
# ^  - suppressValidator + validatorLevel: core has a row validator
# ^    `self.price > 0 or 'price must be positive'` (error). Since this mod
# ^    deliberately allows a negative clearance price (see ItemPatch.tsv), it
# ^    downgrades that validator to `warn`, matched by its exact expression text.
# ^ Together: widen the type + suppress the validator (both overlay ops) + set the value
# ^ (via a row patch). NOTE: an overlay file's column 1 (`column`) is its primary
# ^ key, so put all operations for one column on ONE row (one row per column).
